candidate_definition_hints.text: GitHub App that enforces the Developer Certificate of Origin (DCO) on Pull Requests

a GitHub Integration built with [probot](https://github.com/probot/probot) that enforces the [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/) (DCO) on Pull Requests. It requires all commit messages to contain the `Signed-off-by` line with an email address tha…
